64: The contest evolved once more after Zoraal Ja was made king. It was he who proposed the use of feral souls to enhance one's flesh, leading to the technology for it being devised.
After Zoraal Ja was made king, he proposed the use of feral souls to enhance one's flesh, leading to the technology for it being devised.

65: So it was that combatants took on the power and likeness of beasts, and the audience experienced newfound heights of excitement!
